name: ce-fleet-console
description: ce-fleet admin swarm console — live grid of every fleet node as it enrolls (grey to green), health, role (worker/router/idle/offline), tier, model, and capability status. Tailscale-admin / torrent-swarm feel. Framework-free TypeScript + Vite, importing @ce-net/sdk and the ce-fleet delegate /fleet/rollup endpoints. Read panels are token-free; mutating actions are capability-gated. PHI never leaves the LAN.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>
